# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'REGISTRY_TYPE',
            choices: ['dockerhub', 'ecr', 'gcr', 'custom'],
            description: 'Select registry type'
        )
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_TAG',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Docker image tag'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REGISTRY_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Registry URL'
        )
        string(
            name: 'CUSTOM_REGISTRY_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom registry URL (if custom selected)'
        )
    }
    
    environment {
        DOCKER_REGISTRY = ''
        DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME = ''
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Inputs') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Validate image tag
                    if (!params.IMAGE_TAG || params.IMAGE_TAG.trim() == '') {
                        error "Image tag cannot be empty"
                    }
                    
                    // Validate registry type
                    def allowedRegistryTypes = ['dockerhub', 'ecr', 'gcr', 'custom']
                    if (!allowedRegistryTypes.contains(params.REGISTRY_TYPE)) {
                        error "Invalid registry type: ${params.REGISTRY_TYPE}"
                    }
                    
                    // Set registry URL based on type
                    if (params.REGISTRY_TYPE == 'custom') {
                        if (!params.CUSTOM_REGISTRY_URL || params.CUSTOM_REGISTRY_URL.trim() == '') {
                            error "Custom registry URL cannot be empty"
                        }
                        DOCKER_REGISTRY = params.CUSTOM_REGISTRY_URL.trim()
                    } else {
                        switch(params.REGISTRY_TYPE) {
                            case 'dockerhub':
                                DOCKER_REGISTRY = 'docker.io'
                                break
                            case 'ecr':
                                DOCKER_REGISTRY = "${env.AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${env.AWS_REGION}.amazonaws.com"
                                break
                            case 'gcr':
                                DOCKER_REGISTRY = 'gcr.io'
                                break
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // Validate registry URL format
                    if (!DOCKER_REGISTRY.startsWith('http://') && !DOCKER_REGISTRY.startsWith('https://')) {
                        DOCKER_REGISTRY = "https://${DOCKER_REGISTRY}"
                    }
                    
                    // Sanitize image tag
                    DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME = "${DOCKER_REGISTRY}/${params.IMAGE_TAG}".replaceAll(/[^\w\-\.\/]/, '-')
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                        credentialsId: 'docker-registry-credentials',
                        usernameVariable: 'DOCKER_USERNAME',
                        passwordVariable: 'DOCKER_PASSWORD'
                    )]) {
                        sh """
                            docker build -t ${DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME} .
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Push Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                        credentialsId: 'docker-registry-credentials',
                        usernameVariable: 'DOCKER_USERNAME',
                        passwordVariable: 'DOCKER_PASSWORD'
                    )]) {
                        sh """
                            echo "Logging into registry..."
                            docker login -u \${DOCKER_USERNAME} -p \${DOCKER_PASSWORD} ${DOCKER_REGISTRY}
                            
                            echo "Pushing image..."
                            docker push ${DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME}
                            
                            echo "Image pushed successfully to ${DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME}"
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
